mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_user l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_notice l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_oper_log l ON DATE(l.oper_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_permission l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN front_user l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_role l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_dict_data l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_com_query l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.dt, '%m-%d') AS day_of_week, COALESCE(COUNT(l.id), 0) AS count FROM (SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL a DAY AS dt FROM (SELECT 0 a UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6) n) d LEFT JOIN sys_user_role l ON DATE(l.create_time) = d.dt GROUP BY d.dt ORDER BY d.dt
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notice
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_oper_log
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_permission
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM front_user
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dict_data
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_com_query
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role
